heading: Omitted
label: 1300m–3 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for the transfer of land to the United States to be held in trust for the tribe as part of the tribe’s reservation, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 103–454, title III, § 305108 Stat. 4794Nov. 2, 1994
